title: IJSEM -- The 50 Most-Frequently Read Articles in Int J Syst Evol Microbiol
bodyHtml:

The 50 Most-Frequently Read Articles
in Int J Syst Evol Microbiol during October 2009 -- updated monthly

Most-read rankings are recalculated at the beginning of the month and are based on full-text and pdf views.

1.  Jung-Hoon Yoon, Peter Schumann, So-Jung Kang, Seo-Youn Jung, Tae-Kwang Oh
